## Paddable.padding property

Specify the size of the padding around this widget. For allowed values, see [Scale](./openrct2-flexui.scale.md)<!-- -->.

\*\*Example usage:\*\* \* `padding: "5px"` - applies same padding (5 pixels) to all 4 sides. \* `padding: [ 5, "10%" ]` - applies 5 pixels to vertical sides, 10% to horizontal sides. \* `padding: [ 2, "3w", 4, "5%" ]` - applies in clockwise order; top, right, bottom, left. \* `padding: { top: 15 }` - applies only to named sides, the rest is default.

 "5px" for window frame, "6px" for box children, "0px" for everything else.

**Signature:**

```typescript
padding?: Padding;
```
